zh.Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United: 英國英格蘭戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾
zh.lifeSummary: John Wyse是Alreda Trevage的兒子，於1380年出生在英國戴文盧謝爾頓。他於1399年與Lady Joane Meavy Millaton在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1410年在英國英格蘭戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾享年30歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United: 英国英格兰戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Wyse是Alreda Trevage的儿子，于1380年出生在英国戴文盧謝爾頓。他于1399年与Lady Joane Meavy Millaton在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1410年在英国英格兰戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾享年30岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Wyse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Waterford and Cork): mainly Irish and Scottish spelling of Wise . The name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was also Gaelicized as de Uidheas.

variants.name: Wise
meanings: English: nickname for a wise or learned person, from Middle English wise, wisse ‘wise’ (Old English wīs). This name has also absorbed Dutch Wijs and De Wijs, a nickname meaning ‘(the) wise’, and possibly cognates in other languages.
English: topographic name for someone who lived by the withies or willows, from Middle English withi, Old English wīthig ‘withy, willow’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weiss   ‘white’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: John Wyse was born in 1380, in Thrushelton, Devon, England as the son of Alreda Trevage. He married Lady Joane Meavy Millaton in 1399, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1410, in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Wyse est né en 1380, à Thrushelton, Devon, Angleterre, fils de Alreda Trevage. Il a épousé Lady Joane Meavy Millaton en 1399, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1410, à Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United: Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: John Wyse wurde 1380 in Thrushelton, Devon, England, als Sohn von Alreda Trevage geboren. Er hat 1399 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Lady Joane Meavy Millaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Wyse è nato il nel 1380 nel Thrushelton, Devon, England come figlio di Alreda Trevage. Lui sposato Lady Joane Meavy Millaton nel 1399, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1410, nel Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Thrushelton, Devon, England: イギリスデボンスルシェルトン

ja.Devon, Devonshire, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: John Wyseは1380年にイギリスデボンスルシェルトンでAlreda Trevageの息子として生まれた。1399年にイギリスイギリスデボンでLady Joane Meavy Millatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1410年にイギリスイギリスデボンシデンハム ダムレルで30歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wyse(은)는 1380년 영국 데폰 스루셸턴에서 Alreda Trevage의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Lady Joane Meavy Millaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 시데함 다머에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1410, em Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Wyse родился в 1380 г. в местности трушелтон, девон, Англия. Его мать звали Alreda Trevage. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joane Meavy Millaton в 1399 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности сиденам дэмирэл, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.
